endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policySetDefinitions
endpoints.description: Gets all the built in policy set definitions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policySetDefinitions/{policySetDefinitionName}
endpoints.description: Gets the built in policy set definition.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{POLICYSETDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policysetdefinitionname.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Management/managementgroups/{managementGroupId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policySetDefinitions
endpoints.description: Gets all the policy set definitions for a subscription at management group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPID}} with a real managementgroupid.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Management/managementgroups/{managementGroupId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policySetDefinitions/{policySetDefinitionName}
endpoints.description: Gets the policy set definition at management group level.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPID}} with a real managementgroupid. Replace {{POLICYSETDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policysetdefinitionname.

endpoints.name: PUT /providers/Microsoft.Management/managementgroups/{managementGroupId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policySetDefinitions/{policySetDefinitionName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a policy set definition at management group level.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPID}} with a real managementgroupid. Replace {{POLICYSETDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policysetdefinitionname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /providers/Microsoft.Management/managementgroups/{managementGroupId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policySetDefinitions/{policySetDefinitionName}
endpoints.description: Deletes a policy set definition at management group level.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPID}} with a real managementgroupid. Replace {{POLICYSETDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policysetdefinitionname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policySetDefinitions
endpoints.description: Gets all the policy set definitions for a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policySetDefinitions/{policySetDefinitionName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{POLICYSETDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policysetdefinitionname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policySetDefinitions/{policySetDefinitionName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a policy set definition.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{POLICYSETDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policysetdefinitionname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policySetDefinitions/{policySetDefinitionName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{POLICYSETDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policysetdefinitionname.
